title: Proof of statutes
doc_html:
Art. 1392. Proof of statutes

             The court shall take judicial notice of the laws of the United States, of every state, territory, and other jurisdiction of the United States as provided by Code of Evidence Article 202.

            Acts 2018, No. 184, §1.
doc_text:
Art. 1392.  Proof of statutes
The court shall take judicial notice of the laws of the United States, of every state,
territory, and other jurisdiction of the United States as provided by Code of Evidence Article
202.
Acts 2018, No. 184, §1.
